title: The Battle for Syrup Village Escalates
description: On pages 5–8, the battle for Syrup Village intensifies as the Straw Hats, Usopp, and the village’s defenders confront Kuro’s pirates.
scene: The quiet village becomes a battlefield, with Usopp’s lies turning into real courage and the Straw Hats forcing Kuro’s plan to unravel.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: It doesn't matter if it's disloyal or dishonest!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: If we run, we'll ruin the reputation of the USOPPP pirate group!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Who... What? Didn't he see us...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That was quite an odd attack you just used

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Yup! I ate a "Gomu Gomu Fruit"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: This is bad! You mean it actually exists?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: No wonder that guy's so weird

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: So, rubber- man, then the stretched arm...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: After getting hit on the head by my blade, that's incredible!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: But He can still stand up...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I will take care of this kid!

summary: This part pushes the arc from conspiracy into open battle, testing Usopp’s courage and the Straw Hats’ trust in him.
